visa_type_detail.name: Adjustment of Status
visa_type_detail.description: Adjustment of status is the process that you can use to apply for lawful permanent resident status (also known as applying for a Green Card) when you are present in the United States. This means that you may get a Green Card without having to return to your home country to complete visa processing.
forms: Form I-130, Petition for Alien Relative
Form I-140, Immigrant Petition for Alien Worker
Form I-589, Application for Asylum and for Withholding of Removal
Form I-360, Petition for Amerasian, Widow(er), or Special Immigrant
Form I-526, Immigrant Petition by Alien Entrepreneur
Form I-918, Petition for U Nonimmigrant Status
Form I-929, Petition for Qualifying Family Member of a U-1 Nonimmigrant
Form I-485, Application to Register Permanent Residence or Adjust Status
Form I-485 Supplement A, Adjustment of Status Under Section 245(i)

essential_apps.description: Manage your Social Security benefits and personal information.
Access your medical records, schedule appointments, and communicate with your doctor.
Real-time public transportation information for many cities.
Send and receive money between bank accounts easily.
Widely used for online payments and money transfers.
